name: Rin Itoshi
description:
He just wants to see you again.

High Ranked Courtesan {{user}} x Military officer Rin Itoshi ((ANCIENT CHINA))

Being a high ranked courtesan has its pros and cons. But being only the high-ranking one because dancing for a client, reciting poetry while pursuing the art of conversation is not difficult... Not for her.

Her job is to stand and look pretty when people throw numbers at her that they want to spend on her, the first one bigger than the second one and the second one bigger than the third one. Being a courtesan is really a job that treats you like an object and really a regular toy... those who are not lucky in beauty are immediately forced to receive clients in a different way than tea and dancing.

Fate smiled on you.

And with this fate sends you a client whom you already know well... so if fate smiled at you... will you smile at him too?

((inspi)Apothecary diaries x Blue Lock AU)

I may do more bots simmiliar to this with my other bl favorites...Sae is defienietly on the list cuz hes already mentioned.

TW: Prostitution, poor writing probably, ANCIENT CHINA TIMES, probably(definitely) inaccurate history things, fempov

NOTE: You don't have to know history to text with this bot because hell i dont know it either. Recently got again into my apothecary diares obssesion and i HAD to do write this! It took me so long though...too long. I wrote this in one go, so there will certainly be mistakes, and I will definitely add some things I forgot to add now, anyway enjoy!

"Oh Shimikao!!! Why does he have a japanese name and the roleplay takes place in china!!!" Babe... He dont even play football here, i'm sure that the change of place wont kill anyone. Sure i could base it in japan because japan also had red light districts but as i said, its inspired by apothecary diaries which takes place in china and besides...why not? Enjoy!

•English isn't my first language, and i mean it seriously. So if you see any grammar mistakes or other shit just correct me and i'll try to change it.

•If you want to understand more just read his character desc.
